hero.subtitle: TishkiArami supplies and installs certified firefighting equipment, fire suppression systems and safety solutions for industrial, commercial and residential facilities across Kurdistan and Iraq.

about.title: About TishkiArami
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for fire safety and fire protection systems.
about.story1: TishkiArami is a specialist fire safety company based in Kurdistan, Iraq. We supply, install and maintain certified firefighting equipment and fire suppression systems for industrial plants, commercial buildings, hospitals, hotels and residential developments.
about.story2: Our experienced engineers work to international fire safety standards, ensuring every system we design and install meets local and international codes — giving our clients peace of mind and genuine protection.
about.valuesDesc: We combine a strong product range with certified fire safety expertise.
about.v1Desc: Products approved to international fire safety standards and regulations.
about.v2Desc: Trained fire safety engineers handling design, installation and inspection.
about.v3Desc: From initial survey to installation, commissioning and annual maintenance.
about.v4Desc: We serve our customers in English, Arabic and Kurdish.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Reach out for a quote, technical consultation or product enquiry. Our team responds quickly.

story.kicker: How we save a building from fire
story.step1Text: Trained crews and certified equipment, ready to respond the moment fire breaks out.
story.step2Text: An unprotected building can be lost in minutes — detection and suppression change everything.
story.step3Text: From early detection to fast suppression, TishkiArami keeps your people and property safe.
